title: Velvety Comforting Algerian Aubergine Tagine
description: A silky, comforting tagine that highlights tender baby aubergines in a fragrant, tomatobased sauce, free of animal products and perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Toss the aubergine halves with 2 Tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper; spread on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 25 minutes or until golden and tender.
While the aubergines roast, heat the remaining 1 Tbsp olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, and tomato paste; cook for 1 minute, letting the spices bloom.
Add the chickpeas and water, bring to a gentle simmer, and cook for 5 minutes.
Fold in the roasted aubergine halves and simmer uncovered for another 10 minutes, allowing the sauce to thicken slightly.
Stir in chopped cilantro just before serving.
Serve hot over steamed couscous or crusty bread for a fulfilling meal.
